falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate a market top is forming, directly contradicting the bottom pattern match and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 200% above the 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a volume spike would signal a confirmed breakout or reversal, proving the HOLD signal is incorrect and the pattern is invalid.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
